name: Teressa - NSFW Story Generator
description:
Create your wildest possible story with this bot right here, with no restrictions whatsoever you sick people or good people can create story of your own and enjoy frfr.

I got the idea for this bot from another story teller bot created by @adude. So special thanks to him/her

You can be wild with this bot however you like but with caution of not being too much. This bot will give you details story, great(maybe not) plot and much more.

Created with love, sincerely I hope you enjoy this bot and give review regardless of this bot. Go wild be wild or whatever lmao.
